[Calling write_report(title="Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary for Dr. Martinez", content="# Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary

**Source:** `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  
**Last updated:** 2026-03-28  
**Compound:** NXB-7042  
**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)

| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |
| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

## Quick assessment
- Dosing parameters are present for all three compassionate-use patients.
- No obvious inconsistencies in the config values.
- Clinical notes suggest CU-001 and CU-002 are responding/stable; CU-003 is newly enrolled.
- This file alone does **not** include model-performance or runtime-validation metrics, so it supports a **config-level** stability check only, not a full PK model health assessment.
", recipients="")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing parameters and saved a quick summary for Dr. Martinez.

Quick summary:
- **CU-001:** 12.4 kg × 0.15 mg/kg = **1.86 mg**, **q3w**, next dose **2026-04-14**, PK clearance **3.2 mL/min**
- **CU-002:** 9.1 kg × 0.12 mg/kg = **1.09 mg**, **q3w**, next dose **2026-04-12**, PK clearance **2.8 mL/min**
- **CU-003:** 15.7 kg × 0.18 mg/kg = **2.83 mg**, **q2w**, next dose **2026-04-10**, PK clearance **4.1 mL/min**

Clinical notes:
- **CU-001:** Stable, 22% tumor regression at last scan
- **CU-002:** Responding well, weight gain improving
- **CU-003:** Newly enrolled, first dose given 2026-03-27

On PK model stability:
- **Nothing in the dosing config looks inconsistent or out of range**
- But this file only shows the **current dosing parameters**, not model runtime/validation metrics
- So based on the config alone, things look **stable at the parameter level**, but I can’t fully verify model health from this file by itself

If you want, I can also format this into a shorter email-ready note for Dr. Martinez.
